canonical_answer: A woman with long dark hair wearing a colorful sleeveless top stands in a kitchen featuring light wood cabinets. She holds a green bowl containing raw shrimp while facing the camera. A white toaster oven and toaster sit on the counter to her left. Text overlays displaying website URLs appear at the bottom corners of the screen. A cucumber cup appetizer filled with prawns rests on a white plate.
